channel.title: Game on Raul Correia
channel.description: Recent content in Game on Raul Correia

item.title: Hello World
item.author: your.email@example.com (Raúl Correia)
item.description:
Hello world!

This is my first post on my new created blog, how exciting!

I’m a Software Engineer that moved across europe. Here I share my ideas, projects and interests. To celebrate I leave my favorite game of all time as a easter egg.

Thanks,

Raúl
